discription.text: Are you sure you want to place this request?

buy.text: Buy - Click to enter details before sending your request to buy this item

hold.text: Hold - Click to enter details before sending your request to hold this item

discription.text: A prompt reply is not guaranteed. For immediate updates, contact the supplier by phone.

disciption.text: You are not authorized to perform this action, contact your administrator, or email us at {{x}}

footer.text:
The Jewelers Board of Trade (JBT) is a not-for-profit, member-owned association that delivers accurate and reliable credit information and offers collection services.

By clicking the 'Save & Verify' button above, you agree to JBT's Terms of Use.

If you are not a member of JBT, you can apply on the JBT website.

header.text: Connect your company's JBT Account to increase partner trust and display the JBT logo next to your company information.

jbt.text: We will check if your JBT Number & company name match with JBT data.

phone.text: We will check if your Phone Number & company name match with JBT data.

new.text: You have received a new request!

description.text: Username/Email doesn’t exist. Please sign up or try again.

downloadApp.text: Download the VDB app today and register above for your free B2B membership!

desciption.text: Our team is reviewing your application, and it may take 1-2 days to activate your account.

discription.text:
To sign in, you must first verify your email address. Please follow these steps:
1. Check your email inbox for a verification email.
2. If you cannot find the email, please click Resend Verification and check your spam folder for a message from {{y}}.

If you still can't find the email, or have already verified and are still seeing this message, please contact {{z}} so we can help.

text.somethingWentWrongDescription: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again. If the issue continues, contact support@vdbapp.com

mandatoryDocumentsMessage.text: In order for your account to be activated, the following must be completed:

applicationValidateMessage.text: Please note that our team will need 1-2 days to validate your application. If someone reaches out to request additional details, please answer as best you can to facilitate the approval process.

uploadDocumentsApprovalInformation.text: Our team is reviewing your application, and it may take 1-2 days to activate your account. Uploading proof of your business and identity may speed up the process. Use the 'Upload Documents' link to share your documents. You'll receive an email from the VDB Team to notify you of activation or to request additional information.

documentUploadDescriptionForMandatoryDoc.text: In order for your account to be activated, you will need to provide documentation. Please click on the Upload Documents button for a list of acceptable documents.

markup.infoText: Example: If the base price of a stone is $100, a markup of 10% will result in a final price of $110.

modal.subTitle: The markup amount is expressed as a percentage and added to the actual price of the stone.
